variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16782 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16782 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16782 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson DBA5307 Air Filter, Primary Donaldson Blue | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16782
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Blue® Filters? Donaldson Blue filters with Ultra-Web® media provide superior protection over traditional cellulose filters. • With up to 99.99% efficiency, delivers better protection for high-dust applications. • Sheds dust during equipment vibration for longer filter life and fewer changes. • Performs in extreme temperature and humidity.
